name: claude
description: Delegate coding, debugging, and review tasks to the Claude Code CLI from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding work to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Run Claude Code headlessly through a local Rust companion for coding, debugging, review, and rescue workflows delegated from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review this repository.
Delegate this debugging task to Claude Code.
Use Claude Code for a second opinion.
